ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "item_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product item */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "stock_info" TEXT /* Stock information of the product (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the product available */,
  "uom" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the product (e.g., pair, piece) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Supplier ID of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product for shipping purposes */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added to the inventory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, canceled) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the `orders` table */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the `products` table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer service, customer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
